title: ANC - changes are present after closing/opening the ANC tab
scenario: ANC level does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Set ANC to a specific value (e.g., High, Low, or a custom level).
Close the ANC tab by tapping the back arrow or navigating away.
Reopen the ANC tab by going back to Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC value should remain as previously set (e.g., High, Low, or custom level).
